security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

updater.comment: Updater is OFF by default. To enable: (1) generate a key pair with `npm run tauri signer generate -- -w ~/.tauri/nullpath.key`, (2) set TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY + TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD env vars at build time, (3) replace `pubkey` below with the generated public key, (4) set `endpoints` to where you'll host the latest.json manifest, (5) flip `active` to true. See docs/updater.md.
